title: flaky CI（卡点 + 下一步写具体）
tests: session 没收尾，停在一个具体的竞态假设上。模型要把 blocker 与 next 写到可执行的颗粒度，而非'有个 bug'。
trap: blocker 写成'测试偶尔挂'，next 留空或写'继续查'。

files.ci/integration.yml:
steps:
  - run: apply_migrations
  - run: pytest tests/
files.db/migrations/0007_add_index.sql: create index concurrently idx_orders_key on orders(idem_key);

commits.message: retry flaky checkout test up to 3x
add wait-for-db step before tests in CI

files.ci/integration.yml:
steps:
  - run: apply_migrations
  - run: wait_for_db_ready
  - run: pytest tests/
